title: Parallel shards sdk python (Ingestion)
summary: Parallel shards sdk python — ingestion workflow walkthrough.

content.text:
## Goal

Demonstrate "parallel shards (sdk python)" against the Tinybox ingestion surface end to end.

## Walkthrough

# Step 1 — prepare a bucket for the ingestion workflow.
tinybox buckets create my-bucket --region us-east-1
Apply the recipe; verify with the API reference under [API reference](/docs/api/buckets/get).
